title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.1189 - Effective date of surcharge
text:
67.1189.  Effective date of surcharge. — The surcharge authorized by sections 67.1185 to 67.1189 shall become effective within ninety days from the date such surcharges are approved by the voters of the county pursuant to section 67.1188.  After the effective date of any surcharge imposed under the provisions of sections 67.1185 to 67.1189, the county shall perform all functions incident to the administration, collection, enforcement, and operation of the surcharge.  The surcharge imposed under sections 67.1185 to 67.1189 shall be reported upon such forms and under such administrative rules and regulations as may be prescribed by the governing body of the county.
(L. 1994 S.B. 534 § 5)
